title: Snails Ofthe Unexpected
description: Chaos Theory is a sketch group consisting of four actor/writers – Mikylajane Durkan, Yasser Kayani, Maria Beadell and Bruce Williams, with director/writer Stephen Dinsdale. And there is music with Bunny Hopkins, legendary bluesman! Between them they have played a puddle in an advert, been the face of British Gas at the Olympics, worked with David Icke, worked with Dario Fo, stripped for Danish TV and written for BBC Films, BBC TV, ITV, BBC Radio 4 and the West End. Chaos Theory has been going for about six years and has played the Edinburgh Fringe, the Brighton Fringe several times, the Camden Fringe many times, Faversham Fringe and the Vault Festival. They write their own sketches and the show is always developing and they also support new writing from others. Sketches vary a lot, from light and frothy to dark and disturbing to running for your mum – but in a good way! From the icecream godfather to surgeons sexting to a wasp café. Pretty quickfire. Always funny!
